description: This Java class defines a REST API controller named OfficerController for managing officer-specific endpoints in a loan application system. It includes operations for listing queue items, retrieving application details, overriding decisions, and querying audit logs, with appropriate security roles and annotations.

classes.name: OfficerController
classes.description: Controller managing API endpoints related to officers, including queue listing, application review, decision override, and audit log query, with role-based access control.

methods.name: queue
methods.description: Retrieves a list of submitted applications for review, with optional filters for status and decision.

methods.name: applicationDetail
methods.description: Returns detailed information about a specific application draft identified by UUID.

methods.name: overrideDecision
methods.description: Allows an authorized user to override an application's decision and logs this action as an audit event.

methods.name: auditLog
methods.description: Returns a paged list of audit events filtered by optional parameters such as time range, event type, and user ID.

methods.name: toAuditResponse
methods.description: Converts an AuditEvent entity to its API response representation.

methods.name: parseInstantOrNull
methods.description: Parses ISO-8601 instant strings to Instant objects, returning null if input is blank or null.

methods.name: subjectAsUserId
methods.description: Extracts UUID user ID from Authentication object, throwing exception if invalid.
